examples: If we don't want to live in a pigpen, we have to make time to clean up the room often.
You and I are right in the middle of the pigpen.
Across the field, past the barn and the empty pigpen, past the house with its snow-packed porch, stood a smokehouse.
Bewitched by the patter of a perfume merchant, entranced by the pink and gold of these scented flasks, he steals some of the rejected bottles and hides them in the pigpen.
